## New / updated skill entry

- **Skill:** <name>
- **Source:** <source_url>

### Checklist
- [ ] One file in `entries/`, filename matches the `name` field
- [ ] Source, author, and license are cited
- [ ] `why` and `use_cases` are filled and specific
- [ ] I did **not** copy any third-party skill code — this is a link + metadata only
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/build_readme.py` (README is up to date)
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/validate_entries.py entries/` (passes)
